mapper.sql: item_id, contest_id, item_name, max_score, weight, sort_order, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag
mapper.select: select from jst_score_item where item_id = #{itemId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select from jst_score_item where contest_id = #{contestId} and del_flag = '0' order by sort_order asc, item_id asc
mapper.update: update jst_score_item set item_name = #{entity.itemName}, max_score = #{entity.maxScore}, weight = #{entity.weight}, sort_order = #{entity.sortOrder}, update_by = #{entity.updateBy}, update_time = #{entity.updateTime} where item_id = #{entity.itemId} and del_flag = '0'
